subcodes.first_line: O Friend! Hearken unto the call of the Beloved, for He maketh mention of thee from this praiseworthy station. Blessed is the pilgrim who seeketh the resting-places [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا حبیب ان استمع ندآء المحبوب انه یذکرک فی هذا المقام المحمود طوبی لزآئر قصد مضاجع
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for forgiveness, @justice and wrath of God, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @contention and conflict, @the power of words; of speech
